ogTitle: Upper Hermitage vs Upper Sturt: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Hermitage and Upper Sturt.
heading: Upper Hermitage vs Upper Sturt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Hermitage, South Australia and Upper Sturt, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Sturt has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Upper Hermitage (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Hermitage or Upper Sturt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Hermitage has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Upper Sturt scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Hermitage scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Sturt scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Hermitage or Upper Sturt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Sturt has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
